name: Gufic Biosciences Limited
summary: Gufic Biosciences Limited engages in the manufacture and marketing of active pharmaceutical ingredients (APIs), generic pharmaceuticals, and related services in India. It manufactures APIs and bulk drugs, such as antifungals, anaesthetics, and immuno suppressants, as well as intermediates for antifungals. The company also manufactures lyophilized injections, which include antibiotic, antifungal, cardiac, infertility, antiviral, and proton-pump inhibitor segments. In addition, it offers spark, criti care, and ferticare pharmaceutical products; and herbal and personal care products. The company supplies its products to hospital chains and medical facilities. It also exports its products. The company was founded in 1970 and is based in Mumbai, India.
